mapper.sql: COUNT(*) AS bs, COUNT(DISTINCT DJXH) AS hs, SUM(YBTSE) AS ybtse, SUM(JCGHJE) AS jcghje, SUM(CBJJE) AS cbjje, SUM(HYGHJE) AS hyghje, SUM(XJGHJE) AS xjghje, SUM(SJGHJE) AS sjghje, SUM(SZGHJE) AS szghje, SUM(QGGHJE) AS qgghje, SUM(SDSJE) AS sdsje, SUM(SWJGJE) AS swjgje
mapper.select:
SELECT dept_id AS deptId,
FROM gh_jf
GROUP BY dept_id

SELECT dept_id AS deptId, JSBJ AS jsbj,
FROM gh_jf
GROUP BY dept_id, JSBJ

SELECT dept_id AS deptId, JSBJ AS jsbj, CBJTHBJ AS cbjthbj,
FROM gh_jf
GROUP BY dept_id, JSBJ, CBJTHBJ

SELECT dept_id AS deptId, JSBJ AS jsbj, CBJTHBJ AS cbjthbj, ZSPM_DM AS zspmDm,
FROM gh_jf
GROUP BY dept_id, JSBJ, CBJTHBJ, ZSPM_DM

SELECT dept_id AS deptId, JSBJ AS jsbj, CBJTHBJ AS cbjthbj, ZSPM_DM AS zspmDm, HKPCH AS hkpch,
FROM gh_jf
GROUP BY dept_id, JSBJ, CBJTHBJ, ZSPM_DM, HKPCH
mapper.sql: select * from (SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM SJJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) SJJFCX UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM HYJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) HYJFCX UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM SZDQYJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) SZDQYJFCX UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM SZTLJJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) SZTLJJFCX UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM SZMHJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) SZMHJFCX UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM SZZCJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) SZZCJFCX UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH, COUNT(T.YBTSE) JFBS, COALESCE(SUM(T.YBTSE), 0) JFJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.SZGHJE), 0) SZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE), 0) QZJE, COALESCE(SUM(T.QGGHJE + T.SZGHJE), 0) HJJE FROM SZYBQYJFCX T WHERE T.SZGHJE != '0' AND T.ZSPM_DM != '399001910' AND T.jsbj in ('Y', 'S', 'W') GROUP BY T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.HKPCH) SZYBQYJFCX) SZQZDZZC

SELECT T.HKPCH, T.DWDM, T.DWMC, T.SHXYDM, T.NSRMC, T.GZZE, T.SL, T.YBTSE, T.JCGHBL, T.JCGHJE, T.JCGHHM, T.CBJBL, T.CBJJE, T.HYGHBL, T.HYGHJE, T.SDGHBL, T.SDGHJE, T.SDGHHM, T.XJGHBL, T.XJGHJE, T.SJGHBL, T.SJGHJE, T.SZGHBL, T.SZGHJE, T.QGGHBL, T.QGGHJE, T.SWJGBL, T.SWJGJE, T.SDSBL, T.SDSJE, T.SKSSQQ, T.SKSSQZ, T.ZSPM_DM, T.RKRQ, T.JSRQ FROM ${sourceView} T
